use_cases: Display daily screen time statistics with animated bar graphs
Show top used applications with icons and usage duration
Visualize usage patterns across different time periods of the day
Track wellness metrics for health and productivity apps
Present usage analytics in a clean, modern card interface
ai_summary: A glass-morphism screen time card component featuring an animated bar graph displaying usage statistics across time periods, along with a list of top apps showing icons, names, and usage duration. Uses framer-motion for smooth scaleY animations on bars, with a soft gradient background blending blue, purple, and pink tones. Designed for wellness, productivity, and analytics applications needing to visualize device usage patterns.
